prose: Fukui reactivity analysis of phenol (13 atoms: O, C×6, H×6) computed at the DFT level using B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier 'standard') in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. N±1 states used charge ±1 and multiplicity 2. Partial charges via Mulliken (PySCF). The headline result is the maximum f⁺ value (most electrophilic site): f⁺ = 2.1028319 at atom C3 (1-based index 3, ortho carbon). The most nucleophilic site is O1 with f⁻ = 0.16201477. The dual descriptor at C3 is +2.0319, confirming its electrophilic character. Charge conservation checks: sum(f⁺) = 1.0000, sum(f⁻) = 1.0000. Integrity status: trustworthy = true. No warnings reported. CLI: /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui --method dft --charge 0 --mult 1 --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard phenol.xyz. Output plot: /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/phenol/argo_claude-sonnet-4.6/20260706-185710_phenol_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png.
